The '''Reflection Gardens''' were a public garden on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] were [[Wedding of Luke Skywalker and Mara Jade|publicly married]] there.

==Appearances==
*[[Union 2|''Union'' 2]] {{1st}}
